reviews.comment:
Malísimo en ese lugar me perdieron la tarjeta Serviclub cuando la entregué para cargar puntos! En 2 minutos! Y no se hicieron cargo. Pésimo nadie me dió solución, me parece una falta de respeto. Además con muuuucha frecuencia ohhj casualidad, no "anda" Posnet o Serviclub. No lo recomiendo para nada

(Translated by Google)
Absolutely terrible! They lost my Serviclub card when I handed it in to load points! In just two minutes! And they refused to take responsibility. It was awful; nobody offered a solution, which I find disrespectful. Plus, what a coincidence, the POS terminal and Serviclub system are frequently out of order. I absolutely do not recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNk9lSnV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Como nos tiene acostumbrado el Automóvil Club Argentino en todos los rincones del país, gran parte del logro se lo debemos a la muy buena atención del personal; un detalle para que tomen como ejemplo otras estaciones "impresionante limpieza en sus baños".

(Translated by Google)
As is customary with the Automóvil Club Argentino throughout the country, much of the success is due to the excellent service of the staff; a detail that other stations should take as an example: "impressive cleanliness in their bathrooms".
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNX2RHbjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Por costumbre y cercanía siempre cargo nafta para el auto, buena atención..!

Out of habit and because it's nearby, I always fill up my car with gas; great service!
